← All NHC examples

NHC1 — single race, SWNHC2015 blend with one slow-extreme boat

Scoring system: NHC1    α (blend factor): — 
Four boats with starting TCFs 0.95 / 1.00 / 1.05 / 1.10.
SWNHC2015 default profile: α_p/n/px/nx = 0.30 / 0.15 / 0.15 / 0.075,
σ thresholds 1.5 over / 1.0 under, MinFin 3.

Boat   TCF    ET     CT       Q         S         extreme   α        Z          NewTCF
Alpha  0.950  3000   2850     1.2923    1.3603    no        0.300    1.0183     1.015
Beta   1.000  3600   3600     1.0769    1.0769    no        0.150    0.9972     0.994
Gamma  1.050  4200   4410     0.9231    0.8791    no        0.150    1.0187     1.016
Delta  1.100  4800   5280     0.8077    0.7343    yes †     0.075    1.0781     1.075

Delta's S = 0.7343 < sLo = 0.7780, so it's classified extreme-slow.
All other boats are non-extreme. Realignment factor Z51 ≈ 0.9970
preserves ΣTCF (sum of newTcf = 4.100 = ΣL exactly after rounding).

Race 1

Gun time: 14:00:00   Finishers: 4   CTavg: 67m 15s   mean(TCF): 1.0250
μ(S): 1.0127   σ(S): 0.2347   extreme if S > 1.3647 or < 0.7780 (1)   P50: 0.646154   W51: 0.588785   Z51: 0.997030
RankNameSail # Finish timeETTCFappliedCT QSαZadjnew TCF Points
1 Alpha 1 14:50:00 50m 00s 0.9500 47m 30s 1.2923 1.3603 0.300 1.0183 +0.0650 1.0150 1
2 Beta 2 15:00:00 60m 00s 1.0000 60m 00s 1.0769 1.0769 0.150 0.9972 -0.0060 0.9940 2
3 Gamma 3 15:10:00 70m 00s 1.0500 73m 30s 0.9231 0.8791 0.150 1.0187 -0.0340 1.0160 3
4 Delta 4 15:20:00 80m 00s 1.1000 88m 00s 0.8077 0.7343 † 0.075 1.0781 -0.0250 1.0750 4
